name: discord-reader
description: > Read Discord for financial research using opencli (read-only). Use this skill whenever the user wants to read Discord channels, search for messages in trading servers, view guild/channel info, monitor crypto or market discussion groups, or gather financial sentiment from Discord. Triggers include: "check my Discord", "search Discord for", "read Discord messages", "what's happening in the trading Discord", "show Discord channels", "list my servers", "Discord sentiment on BTC", "what are people
author: himself65
summary_zh: 这是一款专供金融研究的只读工具，能帮你读取Discord交易群和加密货币讨论区消息并收集市场情绪，非常适合需要从社群聊天中挖掘投资线索或做市场调研的场景。
